exercises.code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use("Agg")
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

def meta_bar(labels, values):
    fig, ax = plt.subplots()
    ax.bar(labels, values)
    ax.set_ylim(bottom=0)
    meta = {'n_bars': len(labels), 'ylim0': np.float64(ax.get_ylim()[0])}
    plt.close(fig)
    return meta
print(meta_bar(['a', 'b'], [1, 2]))
